title: Ukrainian Sausage Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Ukrainian-inspired sausage stir fry made with crispy vegetables and savory sausages.
instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced Ukrainian sausages and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the cooked sausages from the skillet and set aside.
Add more oil to the skillet if necessary, then add the chopped cabbage, onion, and bell pepper.
Cook until the vegetables are slightly tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the cooked sausages back into the skillet, along with the paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
